content: agent2: implementing get_image_mimetype() lazy accessor in ImageBlock, file: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py. Will refactor image_to_base64 to use it.

agent2: I'm also touching types.py - already added ImageBlock.get_image_mimetype() (lazy mimetype resolver with base64-decode-aware guessing) and updated image_to_base64 to call it instead of inline guess logic. Only added binascii import + the new method, didn't touch encoding logic itself. Let's merge: you add normalize_image_bytes for the encoding side, I'll keep get_image_mimetype for the mimetype side - should be non-overlapping edits to image_to_base64 body. Ping me before you finalize so we don't clobber each other's edit to that validator.
